creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2007-10-03 03:55:33 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-p2p/azureus      Makefile distinfo pkg-message 
    net-p2p/azureus/files azureus.in 
  Added files:
    net-p2p/azureus/files 
                          extra-patch-com__aelitis__azureus__core__networkmanager__impl__TransportHelperFilterStream.java 
  Log:
  [MAINTAINER] net-p2p/azureus: update to 3.0.3.0
  
          - Update to 3.0.3.0
  
          No longer BROKEN with release swt.
          UI selection works if SWT is built with brower integration.
          i.e. The Vuze interface is default on new installs now.
          Added a hack that I have used for a long time, even though I don't
          know that it is a proper fix or not.
  
  PR:             ports/116850
  Submitted by:   Robert Noland <rnoland@2hip.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.45      +10 -3     ports/net-p2p/azureus/Makefile
  1.17      +3 -3      ports/net-p2p/azureus/distinfo
  1.2       +19 -2     ports/net-p2p/azureus/files/azureus.in
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/net-p2p/azureus/files/extra-patch-com__aelitis__azureus__core__networkmanager__impl__TransportHelperFilterStream.java (new)
  1.3       +1 -1      ports/net-p2p/azureus/pkg-message
